company.name: Abivax SA
company.subtitle: Post-Phase 3 UC induction · Maintenance data Q2 2026 · NDA filing H2 2026

market.notes: UC drug market ~$8B (2024) → $11-14B (2032). Obefazimod is oral, first-in-class miR-124 enhancer. Phase 3 ABTECT induction positive (Jul 2025): pooled 16.4% placebo-adj response (p<0.0001), 1275 patients randomized. 678/1275 entered maintenance. Favorable tolerability, no new safety signals. Competitors: Entyvio (vedolizumab), Stelara (ustekinumab), Rinvoq (upadacitinib), Zeposia (ozanimod), Velsipity (etrasimod).

CD drug market comparable to UC. ENHANCE-CD 12-week induction data expected Q4 2026. Anti-fibrotic activity shown preclinically (ECCO 2026: ~60-90% reduction in fibrosis score). Fibrosis is a key unmet need in CD — could be a differentiator if confirmed clinically.

mega_bear.narrative: Maintenance data fails — NDA collapses — back to €5
events: ✗ 44-week maintenance shows complete loss of response
✗ NDA cannot be filed — back to square one
✗ miR-124 mechanism questioned — no durability
→ Stock reverts to pre-Phase 3 levels (€5-10), needs to raise capital

bear.narrative: Maintenance fails or underwhelms + CD disappoints
events: ✗ 44-week maintenance data shows significant efficacy loss
✗ FDA pushes back on NDA — requests additional data or longer follow-up
✗ ENHANCE-CD induction misses in Crohn's
→ Stock re-rates to pre-Phase 3 levels, pipeline credibility damaged

base.narrative: UC maintenance confirms induction + CD shows signal
events: ✓ 44-week maintenance data positive — durable remission
✓ NDA filed H2 2026, MAA in parallel
~ ENHANCE-CD 12-week data shows encouraging signal
→ UC approval mid-2027, commercial launch H2 2027
✓ Maintenance shows class-leading durability + safety
✓ FDA grants Priority Review — approval H1 2027
✓ ENHANCE-CD hits, establishing IBD franchise
✓ Anti-fibrotic angle differentiates from JAK/S1P — M&A target

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Best-in-class IBD franchise — UC + CD + anti-fibrotic platform — AbbVie/Roche acquires
events: ✓ Maintenance shows deepening response + class-leading safety
✓ FDA grants Priority Review — approval H1 2027
✓ ENHANCE-CD hits — oral IBD franchise across UC + CD
✓ Anti-fibrotic mechanism validated clinically — AbbVie/Roche acquires at €200+

lastData.title: ABTECT Phase 3 induction — UC (positive)
points: Pooled 16.4% placebo-adjusted clinical response (p<0.0001) at 8 weeks
1,275 patients randomized — one of the largest UC Phase 3 programs ever
Favorable tolerability, no new safety signals
22 abstracts at ECCO 2026 — subgroup analyses, biomarkers, anti-fibrotic data
miR-124 upregulation confirmed + IL-17A, IL-6 reduction toward homeostasis
Preclinical: 60-90% fibrosis score reduction (oral presentation ECCO 2026)
Stock went from ~€5 to €90+ on the data

nextCatalyst.title: ABTECT 44-week maintenance data (UC)
thresholds: Primary: durability of clinical response/remission at week 44
Key: remission rate in maintenance vs re-randomized placebo
This is THE gating event for NDA filing (planned H2 2026)

risks: Maintenance data is binary — if durability fades, NDA collapses
UC market is crowded (Rinvoq, Entyvio, Stelara, Zeposia, Velsipity)
Stock ran from €5 to €90+ on induction alone — maintenance is priced in to some degree
No commercial infrastructure yet — will need to build or partner
Single-asset company (obefazimod for UC + CD, same molecule)
Crohn's disease Phase 2b data not until Q4 2026
Anti-fibrotic data is preclinical only — clinical translation uncertain
Cash runway Q4 2027 — may need to raise if NDA delayed
